description_long: This is a woven straw hat with a dome-shaped crown and a moderately wide, upturned brim. The hat features a natural beige coloration with subtle brownish gradients, giving it a sun-bleached, rustic appearance. At the top of the crown, there is a small, round wooden knob, which adds a unique decorative touch. The brim is intricately braided, providing both structural integrity and visual interest. A small rectangular fabric tag with a logo is attached to the side of the brim. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, breathable design suitable for sun protection in outdoor urban environments.
description: A dome-crowned, woven straw hat with a braided upturned brim, wooden knob on top, and a small logo tag on the side.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the woven texture, braided brim, wooden knob, and visible logo tag.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the symmetrical dome crown, centered wooden knob, and braided brim.
description_view_2: Rear-left view emphasizing the continuous woven pattern and the curvature of the brim, with the knob visible.
description_view_3: Direct rear view focusing on the back of the dome crown and the even, upturned brim.
